description_long: This is a standard claw hammer featuring a robust, metallic head and a long, black handle. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a curved, bifurcated claw on the other, designed for pulling nails. The handle appears to be covered in a textured, rubberized grip for enhanced comfort and slip resistance during use. The transition between the head and handle is reinforced with a metallic collar, suggesting durability and strength. The hammer shows a matte to semi-gloss finish, with the head displaying a slightly worn metallic sheen. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, and the tool appears functional and utilitarian.
description: A black-handled claw hammer with a metallic head, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal. The handle is textured for grip and comfort.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen at an angle, highlighting the length of the handle and the metallic head with its distinct claw and striking face.
description_view_1: This side view clearly shows the curved claw and the flat striking face, as well as the full length of the textured handle.
description_view_2: The hammer is displayed from the opposite side, emphasizing the metallic head's profile and the ergonomic handle.
description_view_3: A top-down view reveals the bifurcated claw and the alignment of the head with the handle, showing the tool's functional geometry.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, rubberized ergonomic grip handle with a textured surface for slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved, bifurcated claw for nail removal, made of steel.
